rationale.fidelity: Correctly restores first-stage assignments, exogenous availability realization, and constrained second-stage reassignment under the stated cost objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the advance-positioning and limited-recourse problem concrete, though the explicit counterfactual is only implied.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly contribution or novelty claim is made.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Accurately labels scenario representativeness as an assumption requiring calibration and avoids treating availability as controllable.
rationale.prose_clarity: Concise, coherent, and easy to follow.
rationale.overall: An excellent direct correction of the state-as-decision and timing errors.
